Participating startups must demonstrate clear technology prowess, ensuring their solutions are well-aligned with existing market needs and demands. A defined or evolving business model is required, alongside a clear and compelling value proposition that outlines the startup's unique offering and competitive advantage. Linkage with incubators, academic institutions, government bodies, or industry partners is considered an added advantage during evaluation. Application Process Startups must submit a detailed business case covering problem, solution, market, model, financials, traction, impact, and support needed.
